global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Modular open-source framework for long-running agent memory and context management; TokenPilot module reduces context growth via stable-prefix rewriting, observation reduction, and lifecycle-aware eviction, achieving up to 95.7% fewer input tokens and 87% lower cost on benchmarks.

near_misses.project: MRAgent / Graph Memory for LLM Agents
near_misses.technical_takeaway: ICML 2026 paper proposing graph-based memory with active reconstruction for LLM agents, improving multi-hop and temporal reasoning by integrating reasoning into retrieval process.
near_misses.reason: Relevant memory innovation but academic paper rather than new open-source repo or production framework.
